ogTitle: Chiswick vs Chittaway Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chiswick and Chittaway Bay.
heading: Chiswick vs Chittaway Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chiswick, New South Wales and Chittaway Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chiswick has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Chittaway Bay (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chiswick or Chittaway Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chiswick has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Chittaway Bay scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chiswick scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Chittaway Bay scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chiswick or Chittaway Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chiswick has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
